title: Xamuulaha
subtitle: Maaree oo raac xamuulahaaga meel keliya

empty.switch_tab: Samee xamuul ama u beddel tab kale.
empty.created_hint: Ku bilow samaynta xamuulkaaga ugu horreeya adoo isticmaalaya foomka kore.
empty.price_requested_hint: Markaad codsato qiimaha xamuulka, halkan ayuu ka muuqan doonaa.
empty.priced_hint: Xamuulaha sugaya qiimayaasha gaadiidleyda ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona.
empty.accepted_hint: Xamuulahaada la aqbalay iyo qiimayaashii ugu dambeeyay ayaa halkan lagu soo taxnaan doonaa.

detail.failed_to_load: Faahfaahin xamuulka lama soo rari karin
detail.not_found: Xamuulka aad raadinayso ma jiro ama khalad ayaa dhacay.
detail.route_description: Faahfaahinta meesha laga bilaabo iyo meesha loo socdo

containers.title: Kontaynarada
containers.assignment_desc: Maaree kontaynarada loo meelmaariyay xamuulkan. Raadi oo meelmari kontaynarada ama ka saar kuwa jira.

quotes.title: Qiimayaasha Gaadiid-qaadaha
quotes.select_hint: Dooro qiimayaasha aad u aqbalayso xamuulkan
quotes.will_appear: Qiimayaasha gaadiid-qaadahu waxay halkan ka muuqan doonaan marka la soo gudbiyo.
quotes.accept_confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad aqbalayso {{count}} qiimayaal oo la doortay oo gaadiid-qaadayaal ah ee xamuulka #{{id}}?

remove_container.title: Ka saar kontaynarka
remove_container.message: Ka saar kontaynarka xamuulkan? Dib ayaad u meelmarin kartaa mar dambe.

price.unable_to_request: Qiimo Codsi La Sameyn Kari Waayay
price.success_title: Codsiga Qiimaha Si Guul Leh Ayaa Loo Diray
price.success_message: Codsigaaga qiimaha si guul leh ayaa loo diray. Waa laguu soo sheegi doonaa marka jawaab la helo.

delete.title: Tirtir Xamuulka
delete.confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtirto xamuulka #{{id}}? Ficilkan lama celinayo.
delete.warning_containers: ⚠️ Xamuulkani wuxuu leeyahay {{count}} kontaynar oo la meelmaariyay. Waa la ka saari doonaa.
delete.warning_containers_full: ⚠️ Digniin: Xamuulkani wuxuu leeyahay {{count}} kontaynar oo la meelmaariyay. Waa la ka saari doonaa xamuulkan.

create_form.title: Samee Xamuul Cusub
create_form.subtitle: Buuxi faahfaahinta xamuulka si aad u samayso xamuul cusub

sidebar.title: Xamuulaha
sidebar.empty: Xamuul ma jiro weli. Samee mid si aad u bilowdo.

assign_table.title: Meelmarinta Kontaynarka
assign_table.showing_available: Muujinaya {{count}} kontaynar oo la heli karo • Qor si aad u raadiso
assign_table.no_available: Kontaynar la heli karo ma jiro
assign_table.select_shipment_desc: Raadi oo meelmari kontaynarada la heli karo xamuulkan.
assign_table.no_shipment_desc: Dooro xamuul si aad u maarisid kontaynarada.
assign_table.remove_confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad ka saaraysid kontaynarka {{number}} xamuulkan?

documents.title: Dukumeentiyada
documents.select_hint: Ka dooro xamuul dhinacbaraha si aad u aragto ama u soo rarisid dukumeentiyada
documents.upload_success: Dukumentiga si guul leh ayaa loo soo raray
documents.delete_success: Dukumentiga si guul leh ayaa loo tirtiray
documents.document_uploaded: Dukumentiga si guul leh ayaa loo soo raray
documents.click_to_upload: Guji si aad u soo rarisid ama ku dheji
documents.invalid_file_type: Nooca faylku waa khalad. Fadlan soo rar PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, ama PNG.
documents.file_too_large: Faylka cabbirku wuu ka weyn yahay 10MB. Fadlan dooro fayl yar.

uploaded_docs.title: Dukumeentiyada la soo raray
uploaded_docs.hint: Horfiiri ama soo deji dukumeentiyada. Guji Horfiiri si aad app-ka ugu aragto, ama Soo Deji si aad u kaydsato faylka.

priced.title: Xamuulaha La Qiimayay
priced.subtitle: Dhammaan xamuulaha la qiimayay iyo qiimayaasha gaadiid-qaadayaasha
priced.error_loading: Khalad soo rarida xamuulaha la qiimayay:
priced.quotes_for: {{count}} qiimayaal oo gaadiid-qaadayaal ah ee xamuulka #{{id}}
priced.returning_fee: Khidmad joogto ah oo 10,000 ETB ah ayaa lagu daraa marka ugu yaraan 1 kontaynar soo noqonayo. Khidmaddan waxaa ku jirta wadarta qiimaha.
priced.accept_dialog_message: Ma hubtaa inaad aqbalayso {{count}} qiimayaal oo la doortay?
priced.accept_dialog_detail: Ficilkani wuxuu aqbali doonaa dhammaan alaabta xamuulka ee gaadiid-qaadayaasha la doortay ee xamuulka #{{id}}.

accepted.title: Alaabta Xamuulka La Aqbalay
accepted.subtitle: Qiimayaasha gaadiid-qaadayaasha la aqbalay ee xamuulkan
accepted.error_loading: Khalad soo rarida alaabta la aqbalay:
accepted.select_shipment: Dooro xamuul si aad u aragto alaabta la aqbalay.
accepted.no_found: Alaab la aqbalay lama helin xamuulkan.

tracking.title: Raac Xamuulka
tracking.not_available: Xogta raadraaca weli ma diyaarsana xamuulkan.
tracking.no_data_desc: Raadraaca tooska ah wuxuu la heli doonaa marka xamuulka la aqbalo gaadiidna la meelmariyo.
tracking.no_trucks_desc: Meelmarinta gaadiidka iyo raadraaca GPS-ka tooska ah waxay halkan ka muuqan doonaan marka xamuulka la aqbalo gaadiidna la diro.
tracking.failed_to_load: Macluumaadka xamuulka lama soo rari karin
tracking.could_not_retrieve: Xogta xamuulka lama soo saari karin.

quotes_detail.title: Xamuulka #{{id}} - Qiimayaasha
quotes_detail.subtitle: Dib u eeg oo aqbal qiimayaasha gaadiid-qaadayaasha xamuulkan
quotes_detail.error_loading: Khalad soo rarida qiimayaasha. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
quotes_detail.compare_quotes: Is bar bar dhi qiimayaasha gaadiid-qaadayaal kala duwan oo aqbal soo jeedinta ugu fiican
quotes_detail.accept_confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad aqbalayso qiimahan ka yimid Gaadiid-qaadaha #{{id}}?
